description: Subscribes a client to receive out-of-band data by providing a callback URL via the POST /streams endpoint.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: To subscribe to the data stream, send a POST request to the /streams endpoint with the callbackUrl as a query parameter.

callbackUrl.description: The URL where data will be sent. Must be network accessible by the source server.

postconditions: A subscription is created; out-of-band data will be sent to the callbackUrl.
preconditions: The callbackUrl must be a valid URI and network accessible.

name: subscribe_to_stream_api_doc_openapi_callbacks

challenges.expected_evidence: A successful HTTP POST request to /streams with the proper parameter results in a subscription confirmation or an appropriate status code.
challenges.failure_signal: A 4xx or 5xx error, or the request is missing the required callbackUrl parameter.
rubric: Correctly constructs and sends a POST request to /streams with the callbackUrl query parameter.
Ensures the callbackUrl is a valid URI and network-accessible as required.
Successfully interprets the response (even if minimal).
challenges.task: Subscribe a client to receive out-of-band data given a valid callback URL.

challenges.expected_evidence: The skill outputs an error indicating the callbackUrl is required or invalid, and no HTTP request is made.
challenges.failure_signal: An HTTP request is sent with an invalid or missing parameter, resulting in a server error.
rubric: Detects missing or malformed callbackUrl before making the request.
Returns a clear error message explaining the issue.
Does not send an invalid request to the server.
challenges.task: Handle the case where the callbackUrl is missing or invalid (e.g., not a proper URI or not network-accessible).

constraints: The callbackUrl must be network accessible by the source server.
The callbackUrl must be a valid URI (format: uri).
facts: The required query parameter is callbackUrl, which must be a network-accessible URI.
The response or further details are not specified; the API description states 'subscribes a client to receive out-of-band data'.
procedures: Send a POST request to /streams?callbackUrl={uri} with the callback URL as a query parameter.
context_pack.summary: This is an OpenAPI 3.0 specification for a single endpoint that allows clients to subscribe to receive out-of-band data by providing a callback URL.

ctx2skill_evidence.demo_scope: P0/P1 demo-paper implementation; not full long-horizon self-play training.

judge_results.rationale: Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.

ctx2skill_evidence.paper_method: Ctx2Skill-lite: challenger -> reasoner/judge -> proposer -> cross-time replay

selected_candidate.description: Subscribes a client to receive out-of-band data by providing a callback URL via the POST /streams endpoint.

callbackUrl.description: The URL where data will be sent. Must be network accessible by the source server.

selected_candidate.name: subscribe_to_stream
postconditions: A subscription is created; out-of-band data will be sent to the callbackUrl.
preconditions: The callbackUrl must be a valid URI and network accessible.
selected_candidate.prompt_template: To subscribe to the data stream, send a POST request to the /streams endpoint with the callbackUrl as a query parameter.

ctx2skill_evidence.selected_reason: The context describes a single API endpoint with a straightforward action. The atomic 'subscribe_to_stream' skill directly maps to this action, is reusable in any scenario requiring a callback-based subscription, and scores well on the cross-time replay lite assessment due to its clear input/output and minimal dependencies.

creation_context.paper_or_project: OpenAPI callback sample / API skill extraction
creation_context.raw_content_preview:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Callback Example
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /streams:
    post:
      description: subscribes a client to receive out-of-band data
      parameters:
        - name: callbackUrl
          in: query
          required: true
          description: |
            the location where data will be sent.  Must be network accessible
            by the source server
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uri
            example: https://tonys-server.com
